name: LUNA

abilities.name: Demise (Man's Best Friend)
abilities.text: After this model is killed by the enemy crew, friendly Lucas McCabe models receive a (-) to all attack actions until the end of the game.

abilities.name: Hunting Partner
abilities.text: Friendly model's (missile) attack actions receive a (+) when targeting a model engaged by this model.

actions.name: Sneak Thief
actions.effects: If this action receives a raise, attach an Artifact upgrade to this model.

triggers.name: Chew Toy
triggers.text: Discard an Artifact upgrade attached to this model. Draw a card, then make a Scheme marker in base contact with this model.

triggers.name: You're Comin' With Me
triggers.text: Move the target up to 3", then place this model into base contact with it.

actions.name: Fetch
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Another ally only.
actions.effects: Attach an Artifact upgrade to the target.

actions.name: Resupply
actions.effects: Draw up to two cards from this model's discard pile with values of 1-5.

extraction_notes: Keywords section appears empty after the diamond bullet separator
